text.A CSS hex color (#rrggbb), RGB triplet (: A CSS hex color (#rrggbb), RGB triplet ([r,g,b]), RGB565 integer (0-65535), or a Home Assistant template that overrides the default entity color.
text.A display value or Home Assistant templa: A display value or Home Assistant template that overrides what is shown for this item on the panel. Supports typed values (integers, floats, JSON arrays/objects).
text.Additional items to display below the va: Additional items to display below the vacuum controls (up to 6).
text.Additional sensor entities to display as: Additional sensor entities to display as info panels (max 2).
text.Alarm control panel item for arming/disa: Alarm control panel item for arming/disarming the security system.
Alarm control panel with numeric keypad.
text.An MDI icon name (e.g., mdi:lightbulb) o: An MDI icon name (e.g., mdi:lightbulb) or a Home Assistant template that overrides the default entity icon.
text.An attribute name (string) or JSON array: An attribute name (string) or JSON array for nested attribute access that overrides the entity state used for display logic.
text.Background image theme for the clock dis: Background image theme for the clock display.
text.Background image theme for the weather d: Background image theme for the weather display.
text.Background image theme for the word cloc: Background image theme for the word clock display.
Blank/idle page used for sleep state.
text.Choose which panels appear in specific d: Choose which panels appear in specific display states. Leave unset to keep the current panel.
text.Climate item with temperature and mode c: Climate item with temperature and mode controls.
text.Climate/HVAC entity for temperature cont: Climate/HVAC entity for temperature control and mode switching.
text.Colors for entity state indicators (on,: Colors for entity state indicators (on, off, unavailable).
text.Colors for interactive buttons and contr: Colors for interactive buttons and controls.
text.Colors for the main page area: backgroun: Colors for the main page area: background and text at various states.
text.Colors for the top bar: background, titl: Colors for the top bar: background, title text, and accent icons.
text.Configure audible alerts for startup and: Configure audible alerts for startup and incoming notifications, and set a do-not-disturb window to silence sounds during specific hours.
text.Configure how this device behaves: langu: Configure how this device behaves: language and diagnostics, audible alerts, hardware buttons, navigation, sleep/wakeup, and which panels appear in each display state.
text.Configure the physical left/right hardwa: Configure the physical left/right hardware buttons on the NSPanel. Each button can toggle its internal relay or a Home Assistant entity.
text.Controls how the display behaves when wa: Controls how the display behaves when waking from dimmed or sleep state.
text.Controls the verbosity of diagnostic log: Controls the verbosity of diagnostic logging sent to the Home Assistant logs: Off = no debug output, Basic = key lifecycle events, Verbose = all commands and data exchanged with the display
text.Controls whether the last viewed panel i: Controls whether the last viewed panel is restored when waking from sleep or dimmed state.
text.Cover item with open, close and position: Cover item with open, close and position controls.
text.Custom display name or Home Assistant te: Custom display name or Home Assistant template ({{ ... }}) that replaces the default entity name shown on the panel.
text.Custom items shown beside the QR code (m: Custom items shown beside the QR code (max 2).
text.Digital clock with date and notification: Digital clock with date and notification indicator.
Display a QR code alongside item info.
text.Do you want to check for a update?: Do you want to check for a update?
text.General device behavior: display languag: General device behavior: display language, diagnostic logging verbosity, and audible alerts for startup and notifications.
text.Grid of up to 6 item tiles with paginati: Grid of up to 6 item tiles with pagination.
text.Item selection panel with multi-page sup: Item selection panel with multi-page support.
text.Items displayed as a row with cover/acti: Items displayed as a row with cover/action controls.
text.Items to display as tiles on the grid pa: Items to display as tiles on the grid page.
Items to display at the bottom (6 max).
text.JSON object passed as service_data when: JSON object passed as service_data when calling the action. Keys are available as template variables in scripts.
JSON object passed as service_data when calling the action. Keys are available as template variables in scripts. Example: {\"vacuum_repeat\": 2}
Language for the word clock text matrix.
text.Light entity to control brightness, colo: Light entity to control brightness, color and temperature.
text.Maximum age in seconds before falling ba: Maximum age in seconds before falling back to the home panel.
text.Media content IDs shown in the media sel: Media content IDs shown in the media selector.
text.Media player controls with track info an: Media player controls with track info and volume.
text.Media player entity to control playback: Media player entity to control playback and volume.
text.Name: Name
No NSPanel HAUI integration configured. Add one via Settings → Devices and Services.
text.No additional options for this panel typ: No additional options for this panel type.
text.Notification sounds are only played duri: Notification sounds are only played during this time window. Leave both fields empty to allow sounds at any time within the DND window.
text.Only play notification sounds during the: Only play notification sounds during the specified quiet hours. When enabled, notifications are silenced outside this time window.
Override HVAC modes shown on this panel.
Override the color of this item.
text.Override the default popup panel type fo: Override the default popup panel type for this item.
text.Override the displayed name of this item: Override the displayed name of this item.
text.Override the displayed value of this ite: Override the displayed value of this item.
Override the icon of this item.
PIN unlock overlay for locked panels.
text.Play a short audible tone when the displ: Play a short audible tone when the display successfully connects to Home Assistant after a restart or power cycle
text.Play an audible alert tone whenever a ne: Play an audible alert tone whenever a new notification is received from Home Assistant to draw attention to the display
text.Please wait while the update is starting: Please wait while the update is starting
text.Pop-up notification panel with icon and: Pop-up notification panel with icon and optional buttons.
text.Row of entities with cover/action contro: Row of entities with cover/action controls.
text.Seconds of inactivity before the display: Seconds of inactivity before the display dims (0 = disabled, max 3600).
Seconds of inactivity before the display enters sleep mode (0 = disabled, max 3600).
text.Seconds of inactivity before the page ti: Seconds of inactivity before the page timeout fires and transitions to the dimming/sleep cycle (0 = disabled, max 3600).
Select a device to edit its panels.
text.Sensor entity containing Sonos favorites: Sensor entity containing Sonos favorites data.
text.Set a PIN code to lock this panel. Users: Set a PIN code to lock this panel. Users must enter this code before accessing the panel.
text.Show 'IT IS' text on full hour (e.g. 'IT: Show 'IT IS' text on full hour (e.g. 'IT IS FIVE OCLOCK').
text.Show AM/PM indicator on the word clock d: Show AM/PM indicator on the word clock display.
text.Show Kelvin instead of Mireds (Mired is: Show Kelvin instead of Mireds (Mired is default).
text.Show a home navigation button on panels: Show a home navigation button on panels so users can tap to return to the configured home panel from any page
text.Show a notification on the display when: Show a notification on the display when the timer completes.
text.Show a notifications button on supported: Show a notifications button on supported panels that indicates and provides access to any pending notifications
text.Show a sleep button on the home panel th: Show a sleep button on the home panel that lets users manually put the display into sleep mode
Show current date as a cycle card.
Show current time as a cycle card.
text.Show daily or hourly weather forecast on: Show daily or hourly weather forecast on the bottom row.
text.Show inside (NSPanel) temperature as a c: Show inside (NSPanel) temperature as a cycle card.
text.Show internal NSPanel temperature alongs: Show internal NSPanel temperature alongside weather temperature.
text.Show internal NSPanel temperature sensor: Show internal NSPanel temperature sensor alongside weather data.
text.Show intro text ('IT IS') at start of wo: Show intro text ('IT IS') at start of word clock display.
text.Show intro text on full hour: Show intro text on full hour
text.Show notification indicator icon on the: Show notification indicator icon on the weather screen.
Show notification indicator icon on the word clock screen.
text.Show notification indicator when there a: Show notification indicator when there are pending notifications.
text.Show outside temperature as a cycle card: Show outside temperature as a cycle card.
text.Show temperature value text on the clock: Show temperature value text on the clock screen.
text.Show the main weather icon and condition: Show the main weather icon and condition text.
text.Show weather icon and temperature on the: Show weather icon and temperature on the clock screen.
text.Single light with brightness, color temp: Single light with brightness, color temperature and effects.
Start with a big QR code.
text.Tap a swatch to change a color - the pre: Tap a swatch to change a color - the preview above updates live. Only changed colors are saved.
text.The key of a popup panel configuration t: The key of a popup panel configuration that opens when this item is tapped. Leave empty to use the default popup behavior.
text.The locale determines how dates, times,: The locale determines how dates, times, and numbers are formatted on the display, and which language is used for built-in text labels
text.The panel shown briefly when the display: The panel shown briefly when the display wakes from sleep
text.The panel shown when the display enters: The panel shown when the display enters sleep mode
text.The panel shown when the user navigates: The panel shown when the user navigates home or after dim/sleep returns
text.This is taking longer than usual,: This is taking longer than usual,
text.Timer item with start, pause and stop co: Timer item with start, pause and stop controls.
text.Title shown on the panel header. Falls b: Title shown on the panel header. Falls back to the panel type name if left empty.
text.Toggle this Home Assistant entity (light: Toggle this Home Assistant entity (light, switch, scene, etc.) when the left hardware button is pressed. Only available when the left relay is disabled.
Toggle this Home Assistant entity (light, switch, scene, etc.) when the right hardware button is pressed. Only available when the right relay is disabled.
text.Toggle visibility of on-screen navigatio: Toggle visibility of on-screen navigation buttons on panels.
text.Type of item this entity slot represents: Type of item this entity slot represents
text.Use condition-based colors or monochrome: Use condition-based colors or monochrome for the weather icon.
text.Used to reference this panel in actions: Used to reference this panel in actions and gestures
text.Vacuum robot entity for starting, stoppi: Vacuum robot entity for starting, stopping and returning to dock.
text.Versatile wall panel for HomeAssistant b: Versatile wall panel for HomeAssistant based
text.Weather display with time, date and fore: Weather display with time, date and forecast.
text.Weather entity to display conditions, te: Weather entity to display conditions, temperature and forecast.
text.Weather entity to display temperature, p: Weather entity to display temperature, pressure and weather icon.
text.When enabled, pressing a hardware button: When enabled, pressing a hardware button resets the inactivity timer and prevents the display from dimming or sleeping. Disable to allow buttons to work without delaying display sleep.
text.When enabled, the display dims automatic: When enabled, the display dims automatically after the dimming timeout. Disable to keep the display at full brightness at all times.
text.When enabled, the display enters sleep m: When enabled, the display enters sleep mode after the sleep timeout. Disable to prevent the display from sleeping.
text.When enabled, the display transitions th: When enabled, the display transitions through the dimming and sleep cycle after the page timeout. Disable to stay on the current panel until the dimming or sleep timeout is reached.
text.When enabled, the left hardware button t: When enabled, the left hardware button toggles the built-in physical relay. Disable to assign a Home Assistant entity instead.
text.When enabled, the right hardware button: When enabled, the right hardware button toggles the built-in physical relay. Disable to assign a Home Assistant entity instead.
text.When unchecked, panel is only reachable: When unchecked, panel is only reachable via stack (item actions, gestures, or as home/sleep/wakeup panel)
text.enter an entity ID, panel key, service n: enter an entity ID, panel key, service name, or custom text
text.is already used by another panel: is already used by another panel
smart homes with a custom UI Design.
